nasb.text: Then the men of Judah raised a war cry, and when the men of Judah raised the war cry, then it was that God routed Jeroboam and all Israel before Abijah and Judah.

esv.text: Then the men of Judah raised the battle shout. And when the men of Judah shouted, God defeated Jeroboam and all Israel before Abijah and Judah.

cnv.text: 於是猶大人大聲吶喊；猶大人大聲吶喊的時候，　神就在亞比雅和猶大人面前，使耶羅波安和以色列眾人大敗而逃。

ccb.text: 犹大人便吶喊，上帝使耶罗波安和以色列人败在亚比雅和犹大人面前。
